  "findings": [
    "Insufficient shingle overhang at the eave and rake edges",
    "Non-compliance with manufacturer installation specifications and building code requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove affected starter and field shingles along the eave and rake edges",
    "Reinstall shingles with the correct overhang of 3/8 inch to 3/4 inch per manufacturer specifications and IRC R905"
  ],
  "rationale": "The observed roofing shingles have an insufficient overhang at the eaves and rakes. Standard manufacturer specifications and IRC R905 guidelines require shingles to overhang the drip edge by 3/8 to 3/4 of an inch to prevent water from backing up under the shingles or running behind the fascia. Because the current installation does not meet these minimums, it is prone to water infiltration and is classified as installed-defective.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R905",
    "Manufacturer Installation Specifications"
  ]
}
